findings.one_line: The asserted field-level kernel is presently a finite vertex reduction plus standard rational MILP/branch-and-bound certification with exponential time allowed; it needs a theorem-level frontier advance (or a precise comparison establishing that prior exact Rosenbaum/QCQP optimization cannot compute this shared-law opposite-tail functional) rather than non-materialization of an implicit product table alone.

The related-work discussion gives relevance sentences, but the broad no-published-result claim is unsupported by a direct theorem-level comparison to the closest exact worst-case-calibration/optimization results; identify that comparator and state the unavailable capability, assumptions, and complexity/certificate distinction.
